localizedMetadata.name: Digital Collaboration Essentials for Modern Teams
localizedMetadata.overview: This course helps learners build strong collaboration skills for today’s digital workplace. It covers effective virtual communication, teamwork across remote and hybrid environments, and the use of digital tools to improve productivity. Learners will gain practical strategies to collaborate confidently, reduce communication gaps, and work efficiently with cross-functional teams.

localizedMetadata.name: Effective Communication Skills for Remote Work_
localizedMetadata.overview: This course focuses on developing clear and professional communication skills for remote and distributed teams. Learners will understand best practices for virtual meetings, written communication, and online collaboration. The course helps improve clarity, engagement, and teamwork in digital-first work environments.
